title: cynoglossum zeylanicum var. villosulum
intro: Cynoglossum zeylanicum var. villosulum, also known as the hairy tongue flower or villosulum tongue flower, is a flowering plant species in the borage family. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cynoglossum zeylanicum var. villosulum include the potential treatment of various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues and respiratory problems. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of this plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are believed to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
